item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the requested N+1 split in the first sentence, identifies the three prior downstream routing/split patches, and frames another door-access channel as rule/entry proliferation. It permits only a tightly bounded one-day emergency measure while rejecting a standing new channel, then moves upstream to queue assignment, exception return, ownership, and intake/routing failure diagnosis. This satisfies the positive wakeup criteria and does not directly create another normal channel."}
